description_long: This handgun features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black finish and a compact, rectangular profile. The frame is constructed with a robust, metallic body, complemented by a textured grip for secure handling. The slide is smooth with subtle linear grooves and a prominent logo or emblem on the side, adding a touch of branding. The trigger guard is thick and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement and enhanced safety. The magazine base is slightly extended and contoured, likely for improved reload ergonomics. Overall, the handgun exudes a tactical, utilitarian aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern black handgun with a textured grip, smooth slide featuring a logo, and a robust, compact frame. The design is tactical and utilitarian, with ergonomic and safety-focused features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the textured grip, slide with logo, and extended magazine base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the width of the slide, with minimal detail on the grip or magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the slide, grip, and magazine base from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the rear sight area, with the magazine base visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a textured, ribbed surface pattern for enhanced traction. It appears to be made of a durable polymer or rubberized material, providing a non-slip hold. The grip is integrated seamlessly into the frame, with subtle finger grooves and a slight palm swell for improved ergonomics. There are no visible logos or embellishments on the grip itself, maintaining a clean, functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that offers ample protection for the trigger. It is smoothly contoured without sharp edges, and its generous size allows for easy access, even with gloved hands. The guard appears reinforced and lacks any aggressive texturing or undercuts, focusing on safety and durability.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and compact, consistent with a standard handgun profile, and features a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, suggesting a conventional, non-threaded barrel. The finish matches the rest of the handgun, with a dark, matte or semi-gloss appearance and no visible markings.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features a prominent logo or emblem on the side, likely representing the manufacturer, positioned near the front. There are also subtle linear grooves or serrations along the slide for improved grip during operation. No serial numbers, model names, or caliber designations are visible in the provided views.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly extended and contoured, with a beveled edge for easier insertion and removal. It is flat on the bottom and appears to be made of the same material as the grip, with no visible finger rest, logos, or additional texturing. The design is functional and streamlined, complementing the overall aesthetic of the handgun.
